creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I found the patch at 
http://people.freebsd.org/~alfred/deltas/ports-lock.diff 
and fixed the conflict that currently exists, however... 
when I do a make -f bsd.port.mk -V PORTSDIR I don't get "/usr/ports" 
like I used to.. I'm afraid to apply this patch because it seems to do 
funky things with the targets.  However, I'll look at it after the release 
and throw it in a 4-exp build.
